title: Discrepancy what happens on `read -vlog2k; hierarchy;` depending on Verific presence

features.name: top module with wire constant assignment
features.description: Code should include a top module containing a wire declaration with a multi-bit constant assignment

features.name: read_vlog2k followed by hierarchy without -top flag
features.description: Code should include a read -vlog2k command followed by hierarchy command without the -top flag, which fails to lower abstract modules
